template_data.quote_html: The Schedule opens the door. You still have to walk through it.
template_data.image_headline: APPROVAL IS NOT THE FINISH LINE.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated timeline with 3 milestone icons labeled 'APPLY,' 'APPROVED,' 'NOW WHAT?' — last marker has a question mark. Right side: illustrated professional man in blazer holding clipboard, expression uncertain. Bold headline top: 'APPROVAL IS NOT THE FINISH LINE.' One highlighted callout box with short phrase: 'ACCESS. NOT REVENUE.' Dark navy accents, cream background. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
